creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
We might want to backport these two?

https://github.com/lwindolf/liferea/issues/1200 --> https://github.com/lwindolf/liferea/commit/e1d09156e76b1ca2cd94b1c16edd46dc989c5c20
